title: Chivito Sandwiches
description: A classic Uruguayan sandwich filled with steak, ham, cheese, and vegetables, served with a side of fries.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Season the steak with salt, pepper, and your favorite spices.
3. Grill the steak for 3-4 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
4. Meanwhile, toast the bread by grilling it for 1-2 minutes per side.

5. Assemble the sandwiches by spreading mayonnaise on the bottom slice of bread, then adding a slice of steak, a slice of ham, a slice of cheese, a few slices of green pepper, a few slices of onion, and a few slices of tomato.
6. Top with the top slice of bread.
7. Cut the sandwiches in half and serve immediately.
